name: a2a-governance-bridge-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Sovereign AI tools for everyone.

tools.name: verify_agent_compliance
tools.description: Verify a remote agent meets compliance requirements before allowing A2A transaction.

tools.name: authorize_a2a_transaction
tools.description: Authorize an agent-to-agent transaction after compliance verification.

tools.name: get_trust_registry
tools.description: Get the current agent trust registry.

tools.name: get_a2a_audit_trail
tools.description: Get audit trail of all A2A governance checks.

tools.name: cross_agent_risk_score
tools.description: Calculate composite risk score for a multi-agent workflow.
